name: audio-video-transcriber
description: Local audio/video transcription skill for Codex using Whisper.

interface.shortDescription: Transcribe local audio and video with Whisper.
interface.longDescription: A local Codex Plugin / Skill for transcribing audio and video files into text, subtitles, and structured outputs using a local Whisper CLI.
defaultPrompt: Use $audio-video-transcriber to transcribe a local video.
Start the local transcription inbox watcher.
Check my local Whisper transcription setup.
